name: Barbecued Goat with Lemon Salad and Almond Pe
recipeIngredient: 4 lemons, peeled and sliced very thin
2 bunches arugula, washed and spun dry
1/2 cup green olive pesto (see basic recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Light barbecue or grill.
2. Rinse and pat dry goat legs.
3. In a blender, mix garlic, mint leaves, pepper, and olive oil until a smooth paste is formed. Rub the paste all over both legs and season with salt. Place on the barbecue and cook, turning frequently, until pink at the bone, about 45 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, prepare lemon salad by mixing lemons, extra virgin olive oil, salt, and freshly ground pepper in a large mixing bowl. Allow to stand at room temperature until ready to serve with meat.
5. In a blender, mix almonds, green olive pesto, hot pepper flakes, orange juice, and olive oil until smooth and thick. Remove and set aside.
6. When the goat is cooked, remove from the grill and allow to rest for 10 minutes. Toss arugula with lemon salad and arrange on a platter. Carve goat into 1/4-inch thick slices and arrange on the platter. Drizzle with almond pesto and serve.
7. Yield: 4 servings
